review-loop.description: Pause CI, run the Copilot review->fix loop, re-run tests, then append the exact ` [ready]` tag (leading space) to the end of the PR title
review-loop.template:
Read and follow the project's review-loop skill end to end for PR(s): $ARGUMENTS (if empty, use the current-branch PR plus its `backport-*-to-stable/*` siblings).

@.github/skills/review-loop/SKILL.md

Run autonomously, keep me posted at each phase, and do not merge — stop at the exact ` [ready]` tag appended to the end of the title.
